vulnerabilities.title: Replicator deserializes untrusted user input
vulnerabilities.description: An unauthenticated Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability exists in applications that use the Replicator node package manager (npm) version 1.0.5 to deserialize untrusted user input and execute the resulting object.

vulnerabilities.title: replicator vulnerable to Deserialization of Untrusted Data
vulnerabilities.description: A deserialization issue discovered in inikulin replicator before 1.0.4 allows remote attackers to run arbitrary code via the fromSerializable function in TypedArray object.
